sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find purple objects
p_objs = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print("Purple objects:")
for p in p_objs:
    cr = sum(x[0] for x in p['boundary']) / len(p['boundary'])
    cc = sum(x[1] for x in p['boundary']) / len(p['boundary'])
    print(f"  ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f}) pixels={p['pixels']} hash={p['hash']}")

# Find pink objects (might be the purple square)
pk_objs = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'P']
print("Pink objects:")
for pk in pk_objs:
    cr = sum(x[0] for x in pk['boundary']) / len(pk['boundary'])
    cc = sum(x[1] for x in pk['boundary']) / len(pk['boundary'])
    print(f"  ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f}) pixels={pk['pixels']}")

# Find orange diamond outline
o_objs = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O']
print("Orange objects:")
for o in o_objs:
    cr = sum(x[0] for x in o['boundary']) / len(o['boundary'])
    cc = sum(x[1] for x in o['boundary']) / len(o['boundary'])
    print(f"  ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f}) pixels={o['pixels']}")

# Try clicking the purple square
if p_objs:
    # Find the largest purple object (likely the square)
    p_sq = max(p_objs, key=lambda n: n['pixels'])
    cr = sum(x[0] for x in p_sq['boundary']) / len(p_sq['boundary'])
    cc = sum(x[1] for x in p_sq['boundary']) / len(p_sq['boundary'])
    print(f"\nClicking purple square at ({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f})")
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': int(cr), 'col': int(cc)}])
    print(f"Result: done={result.get('done')}")
    
    # Check orange position
    o_sq = [n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] > 15]
    if o_sq:
        cr2 = sum(x[0] for x in o_sq[0]['boundary']) / len(o_sq[0]['boundary'])
        cc2 = sum(x[1] for x in o_sq[0]['boundary']) / len(o_sq[0]['boundary'])
        print(f"Orange now at ({cr2:.0f},{cc2:.0f})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
